narrative:
Berkshire Twp township has 6,376 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
